query:
SELECT m.* FROM midias m 
INNER JOIN atletas a ON m.atletaId = a.id 
WHERE a.nome = 'Adailton Bravo' AND m.tipo = 'video'
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xkKgzjDtwmdn7p.root --database 7XTarzVUuQNAxDd5Eu29wi --execute SELECT m.* FROM midias m 
INNER JOIN atletas a ON m.atletaId = a.id 
WHERE a.nome = 'Adailton Bravo' AND m.tipo = 'video'
